name: tlswitcher
title: TLSwitcher
description: Switch Typeless accounts and inspect subscription or quota usage from Raycast.
author: beta_cat09

commands.name: index
commands.title: TLSwitcher
commands.description: Switch Typeless accounts and inspect subscription or quota usage.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
